01 / 05 buy

coord-smith demo · ticket purchase

Step 1 of 4 — open the buy intent. The runtime locates the primary action via image template, dispatches a click, then verifies the transition to the seat selection panel.

Select your seat

Step 2 of 4 — pick a seat. Both options are visually distinct so the recipe can target either via separate image templates if a test wants to assert per-seat behavior.

Confirm your seat

Step 3 of 4 — the chosen seat is locked in. Click the confirmation button to proceed to the purchase summary.

Selected seat: A1

Confirm purchase

Step 4 of 4 — review and submit. This is the last click in the flow; it triggers the run-completion path on the coord-smith side.

Order summary
──────────
Event: Demo Concert
Seat: A1
Total: ¥ 88,000

Purchase complete

Done — coord-smith reached run-completion. The run artifact tree contains an action-log entry per per-step mission and a screenshot per step capture.

✓ ticket reserved
tests/fixtures/demo/ticketing.html · viewport 1280×800 · deterministic state machine
